title: LAUREN V - Mangusta 105
description:
LAUREN V is a sleek 32-meter Mangusta 105 luxury motor yacht available for charter in the Mediterranean, including France, Italy and Monaco. Built in 1999 and recently refitted, she combines high-performance cruising with refined Italian design. 

Accommodating up to 9 guests, the yacht features spacious sunbathing areas, stylish outdoor lounges and a contemporary interior. 

Perfect for cruising between Monaco, Cannes and Saint-Tropez, LAUREN V delivers a dynamic charter experience blending speed, luxury and comfort.
